# Scenario: Minimal Service

Set up this repository so resident coding agents work according to the Agent Engineering Manifesto.

Constraints:

- keep the setup minimal and practical;
- create only the docs that are actually useful for this repo shape;
- replace placeholders with project-specific facts;
- avoid architecture or data-topology docs unless they truly add value here.

Expected output shape:

- a project-specific `AGENTS.md`;
- the smallest useful supporting docs and templates;
- clear verification commands for future agent work.
